meeting.track_notes: Poly. 2000m track inside the turf circuit. All races clockwise round turn with 440m run-in. Turf. 2800m triangular-shaped circuit. All races clockwise round turn with 430m run-in. DRAW: Poly: Low-number

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: POWER OF PEARLS makes her poly debut coming into the race on some solid Highveld form. With a 4kg claimer aboard she could prove difficult to beat despite taking on males. HIGHVELD STORM was a beaten favourite last run. He has had two starts for his new stable and the switch to poly could be the answer. DONMAGOO has improved in blinkers and should eature in this line-up. CAPTAIN T has improved on the poly and has the best draw. Newcomer SIERRA FOXTROT has a speedy pedigree and races for an in-form yard. Definitely one to watch n the market.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: PRINS JASPAR was a beaten favourite first up on the poly in his KZN debut. The trip should suit. SAIL THE HORIZON is better than his recent form and ran his best race on the Poly. WINTER CIRCLE was short in the betting when making his debut but finished well back. The betting and step up in trip could tell a story. OWNER OF CREATION is a long-time maiden but has been paying his way. He should not be far off them again but has a wide gate. DIAMOND MAKER has only had two starts and showed some improvement second time out. He has the best draw.

races.race_name: LIVE IT. LOVE IT. OWN IT. www.racecoast. co.za MIDDLE STAKES (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Competitive. INFINITY EDGE has been taking on top class company. She makes her poly debut under a big weight but gets first-time blinkers and she can run up to her rating. This trip should suit and she can score. UBUKHWEBEZANA is in good nick. If she brings the form to the Poly she can be dangerous. BACK AT THE GEORGE is in good form and goes well on the poly. Her last win was over course and distance. SOHOT SOWHAT has consistent Western Cape form over shorter. VICTORY IN ORLEANS made a good start for her new stable when winning first time out.

races.race_name: JOIN THE RACE COAST TURF CLUB TODAY! CLASS 4
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: TAM’S KNIGHT is lightly raced and made steady improvement leading into his impressive last win. He has won on the poly and can follow up. GRAND APPEAL has been consistent over the distance and has the best draw. He has run well on the poly and should be right there. SPAARNE RIVIER may just have needed his last run after a short break. He does appear to be useful and must rate a winning chance. ROYAL SWORD is dropping in trip and should not mind it - his last win came over the track and trip. IBUTHO is usually game this trip and tries for his 11th win.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Competitive handicap. WINGS OF JOSEPHINE has a wide gate but goes well on the poly and has taken on stronger in recent starts. BLAST FROMTHE PAST made no show after winning on the poly on debut. He has been rested since and any market support will be telling. INTREPID is a solid galloper and the switch to the poly with blinkers removed can see him go close. RAINBOW REWARD is seldom far back and his last win came over course and distance. He has a 4kg claimer aboard that should help his chances. VICTOR RAIL ran a cracker last time and could make the grade.

races.race_name: ONLINE FORM GUIDE www.gallop.co.za CLASS 4 (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: QHAWEKAZI was a close-up second to the much-improved De Vlugge last time out jumping from a wide draw. She has a better gate here. FLYING FATE won well on the poly last time out at only her second start. She could be up to the task. Stablemate LIGHT OF GABRIEL had things go wrong in a feature and warrants respect in this. CALL ME JANE and TEQUILA SKY have both been quite useful and look to have much to offer in this. DECEMBER DAWN may just have needed a pipe-opener. Her Western Cape form was useful and a claiming apprentice will help her chances.

races.race_name: LUCKY FISH DESTINY DRAW B STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: UNITED NATION has solid form on the poly and has won over the trip. He faces a smart field but should be right there. BLACK EAGLE is progressive and comes with excellent West- ern Cape form. He tries the poly for the first time. MASTEROFTHEDESERT (wide draw) and POSITION OF POWER (gate one) both have the form to go close. FORTRESS OF FIRE is smart on his day but is 3kg worse off with UNITED NATION given their last encounter on the poly. MAJOR TOMMIE has only twice been out of the money in 12 starts. His last win was over course and distance but a wide draw is a concern.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: WINTER WAVES is back on the poly after a fair run at Hollywoodbets Scottsville. He could get there if the pace is on. GORGEOUS DUDE has his peak run after a break. He loves the surface and with only 51kg to shoulder he will be a big runner. INDECENT PROPOSAL over-raced over further but nevertheless ran a fair race. He should prefer being back over this track and trip. DEFINITELY YES has a tricky draw to negotiate but is holding form well and is due a change of fortune. KALI BWANA has shown up well in two outings since her maiden win but has a wide draw to overcome.
